agent.name: QA Agent
agent.description: Generates test cases and UAT scripts from the approved FSD, User Stories, and API Specification.

input.description: Approved FSD, User Stories, and API Specification from upstream agents

required_fields.description: ID of the project being tested
ID of the approved FSD document
Full markdown content of the approved FSD
ID of the approved User Stories document
Full markdown content of the approved User Stories
ID of the approved API Specification document
Full markdown content of the approved API Specification

optional_fields.description: ID of the approved Screen Specification for UI test case generation
Full markdown content of the approved Screen Specification
Additional testing focus areas from the user (e.g. 'focus on approval flow edge cases')

constraints: Combined input must not exceed 32,000 characters per call
fsd_document_id must reference a document with status approved
user_story_document_id must reference a document with status approved
api_document_id must reference a document with status approved

output.description: Two QA documents: Test Cases and UAT Script

sections.description: Total test cases, breakdown by type (functional / API / edge case / negative)
Objective, scope, target users, acceptance criteria definition
Minimum pass rate and critical test cases that must pass for UAT sign-off

responsibilities: Generate at least one functional test case per FSD specification (FSD-XXX)
Generate at least one API test case per endpoint in the API Specification
Generate edge case and negative tests for all critical paths
Assign TC-XXX IDs to every test case
Reference FSD-XXX, Story ID, and API-XXX in every test case
Write UAT scenarios in language understandable by non-technical business users
Define clear pass/fail criteria for every test case
Do NOT generate test cases for requirements not present in the FSD
Do NOT write test code — test case descriptions and steps only

on_success.condition: Both documents must be created. Human review required before proceeding.

on_failure.message: QA Agent failed to produce test documents. Please review the FSD, User Stories, and API Specification inputs and retry.

office_behaviour.chat_bubble_on_handoff: {test_case_count} test cases and {uat_scenario_count} UAT scenarios ready. Waiting for human review.
